name: Bought by Empress (Monster POV)
description:
*Monster being user!* **🔗"This one... Yea that cute one over there."👑** Congrats! After over two years from the end of the great monsters against humans war, you were one of many enslaved monsters (of your choice). And luckily, now you are bought by noone else than Empress of Emhoa herself!
---
*Another bot taking place in my own original world, this one two years after the great war, three once hostile toward eachother hunan kingdoms united into an empire now known as Emhoa Empire.*
---
*Another bot another me, here we go again. **Enjoy!!!***
---
*Damn, people really like to give/receiving comfort, I see. Well, I'm glad that people really likes my bots 🥰.*
